design_philosophy: Modern yet rooted in tradition. The UI should evoke trust, warmth, and auspiciousness without looking like a chaotic bulletin board. We use wide padding, large emotive photography, and earthy tones like bone-white and terracotta to build a safe, premium matchmaking environment.

headings.usage_rules: Use for all major section titles and profile names. Keep tracking tight on large sizes. H1 must not exceed text-5xl.

body.usage_rules: Use for all data points, bios, and UI elements. High legibility is required for dense profile data.

color_palette.rules: Avoid pure black or pure white except for specific isolated cards. Text must have a slight warm tint. Primary terracotta color is strictly for main CTAs (Connect, Subscribe) and active states.

spacing_and_layout.general: Use generous padding. p-8 or p-12 for main content blocks to create a premium feel.
spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: Use Bento Grid (Tetris Grid) for the profile discovery page. Mix tall cards (portraits) with square cards (quick stats) to break monotony.
spacing_and_layout.radius: rounded-2xl for main cards, rounded-full for buttons and avatars to keep the interface soft and approachable.
spacing_and_layout.header: Sticky glassmorphism header (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80) with 1px border-b border-border.

components.cards: Flat background with 1px border (#E6E2D8), no heavy drop shadows. On hover, apply a soft ambient shadow and -translate-y-1.
components.buttons: Primary buttons use #C84B31 background with white text. Must include hover states and data-testid.
components.forms: Use Shadcn inputs. Inputs should have generous padding (h-12) and clear focus rings in primary color.
components.filters: Use Shadcn Accordion or Sheet for advanced search filters to save screen space on mobile.
components.premium_banner: Use the luxury silk texture as background, overlay with a warm gradient, and feature gold (#D4AF37) typography/icons.

motion_and_interaction.hover: All interactive elements must change state visibly (opacity, subtle scale, or color shift).

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text over images uses a dark gradient overlay (bg-gradient-to-t from-black/60 to-transparent) to guarantee readability.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs) MUST have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='login-button').

hero_background.description: Happy modern Indian couple in traditional attire, used for the main landing page hero section.

premium_texture.description: Luxury white silk texture to be used as a background for Premium Membership tiers or banners.

placeholder_bride.description: High-quality portrait of an Indian bride, to be used as a placeholder in the discovery grid.

placeholder_groom.description: High-quality portrait of an Indian groom, to be used as a placeholder in the discovery grid.

cultural_background.description: Indian temple architecture, suitable for the 'About Community' or 'Success Stories' section background with an overlay.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required fonts: Cormorant Garamond and Outfit from Google Fonts.
Configure tailwind.config.js with the provided color_palette and font families.
Do NOT use generic blue or purple. Stick strictly to the Terracotta (#C84B31) and Gold (#D4AF37) accents against the Bone White (#FDFBF7) background.
Implement the landing page hero with `hero_background`. Apply a bg-black/40 overlay to ensure text contrast.
Build a robust, multi-step registration form using Shadcn components (Inputs, Selects, DatePicker).
Create a 'Discovery' page using a Bento grid layout for profile cards. Use the provided placeholder images.
Implement advanced filters using a collapsible Shadcn Sheet or Accordion on mobile, and a sticky sidebar on desktop.
Add a 'Premium Membership' section utilizing the `premium_texture` background image.
Ensure every single button, input, and interactive card has a distinct `data-testid`.
